narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-H (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,269 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
